nodes.name: Sticky Note5

parameters.content:
![Callforge]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }}
## CallForge - The AI Gong Sales Call Processor
CallForge allows you to extract important information for different departments from your Sales Gong Calls. 

### Call PreProcessor
This workflow preps the calls to pass into the call processor. It also pulls data from the product in order to enrich the AI Prompt to catch typos in the Gong call transcript. It then cleans up the transcript into a single string and then sends it to the call processor.

nodes.name: Split Out Call Data and Competitors

parameters.content:
## Get Gong Calls and Supporting Data
Besides the phone calls, integration and competitor data is extracted to supplement the AI prompt with accurate data to compare against mispronunciations.

## Remove Duplicates from Queue
Checks notion for already processed calls and removes them from the processing queue ensuring data is not duplicated.

## Generate Clean Transcript 
Allows for reduced prompting in the OpenAI node.

## Pass Call Transcripts to Call Processor
The OpenAI node handles this process and outputs in structured JSON.

## Loop through all calls to get enrichment
Allows for easier processing due to complexity

![Callforge]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }}
## CallForge - The AI Gong Sales Call Processor
CallForge allows you to extract important information for different departments from your Sales Gong Calls. 

### Call PreProcessor
This workflow preps the calls to pass into the call processor. It also pulls data from the product in order to enrich the AI Prompt to catch typos in the Gong call transcript. It then cleans up the transcript into a single string and then sends it to the call processor.

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: google Sheets  O Auth2  A P I details
configurationSteps: Verify the settings of the trigger node "When clicking ‘Test workflow’".
Verify the settings of the trigger node "Execute Workflow Trigger".
Open the "Gong" node (n8n-nodes-base.gong) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note1" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Transcript Processor" node (n8n-nodes-base.executeWorkflow) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note2" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note3" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note4" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note5" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Call Aggregator" node (n8n-nodes-base.aggregate) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Integration Aggregator" node (n8n-nodes-base.aggregate) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Get Integrations" Google Sheets node.
Ensure you select the spreadsheet file and specific tab/sheet from the dropdown menus.
Map the input JSON keys to your target sheet columns.
Open the "Get list of Competitors" node (n8n-nodes-base.notion) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Merge 3 objects into one" node (n8n-nodes-base.merge) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Aggregate Call Data" node (n8n-nodes-base.aggregate) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Split Out Call Data and Competitors" node (n8n-nodes-base.splitOut) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Reduce down to 1 object" node (n8n-nodes-base.aggregate) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Get Previous Phone Calls" node (n8n-nodes-base.notion) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Loop Over Calls" node (n8n-nodes-base.splitInBatches) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Process All Call Transcripts" node (n8n-nodes-base.executeWorkflow) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Receive all Transcripts" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Error Handler" node (n8n-nodes-base.stopAndError) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Locate the Set/Edit fields node "Comma Separate Integrations".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
Locate the Set/Edit fields node "Comma separate competitors".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
Locate the Set/Edit fields node "Isolate Only Call IDs".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
Locate the Set/Edit fields node "Only Process New Calls".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Upon trigger activation, inputs will flow through the configured nodes and execute actions successfully.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
